---
title: Finding common transcription factors
date: 2023-04-13
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To identify common transcription factors that were identified by pySCENIC and are mutated in Group 3/4 MB.


## Files and directories

### Code

See `<pyscenic software directory>/shared_pyscenic_tfs_mb_mut.R` and `/CBL_scRNAseq/software/pyscenic/shared_cell_type_tfs.R`.

The first file (`shared_pyscenic_tfs_mb_mut.R`) compares the top *n* regulon TFs with the mutated/overexpressed MB genes.

The second file (`shared_cell_type_tfs.R`) compares the top *n* regulon TFs of each cell type for all pairwise comparisons. For example:

> - RL-VZ vs. RL-SVZ
> - RL-VZ vs. GCP
> - etc.

### Output

See `<pyscenic results directory>/20230413/` for the output files and figures.

The `hendrikse_cell_types` subdirectory contains the overlapping transcription factors for each of the Hendrikse cell types (e.g., RL-VZ, Early UBC, etc.) and the genes mutated/overexpressed in MB. In other words,

$$\text{\{Hendrikse cell types\}} \cap \text{\{genes mutated or overexpressed in MB\}}$$

The `integ_cell_types` subdirectory contains the overlapping transcription factors for each of the integrated cell types (e.g. non-homologous UBCs, homologous UBCs, etc.) and the genes mutated/overexpressed in MB. In other words,

$$\text{\{mouse \& human integrated cell types\}} \cap \text{\{genes mutated or overexpressed in MB\}}$$


## Results

![Intersection of top cell type genes (Hendrikse annotations) and mutated/overexpressed MB genes.](/CBL_scRNAseq/results/pyscenic/20230413/hendrikse_cell_types/tfs_mb_mut_shared_genes_venn.png){#fig-hendrikse-cells}

![Intersection of top cell type genes (integration annotations) and mutated/overexpressed MB genes.](/CBL_scRNAseq/results/pyscenic/20230413/integ_cell_types/tfs_mb_mut_shared_genes_venn.png){#fig-integ-cells}


As seen in @fig-hendrikse-cells and @fig-integ-cells, the only genes showing up are OTX2, CHD2, and HDAC2.
